ddls:
CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "index" INTEGER /* Unique index for each research project record */,
  "researchid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_title" TEXT /* Descriptive title of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "research_area" TEXT /* Academic discipline or area of research */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Lead researcher */,
  "co_investigators" TEXT /* Additional researchers involved in the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Total amount of funding */,
  "started_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the project started */,
  "completed_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was completed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "grade" REAL /* Final grade awarded for the project based on evaluations */,
  "q1" INTEGER /* Score for criterion Q1 */,
  "q2" INTEGER /* Score for criterion Q2 */,
  "q3" INTEGER /* Score for criterion Q3 */,
  "q4" INTEGER /* Score for criterion Q4 */,
  "q5" INTEGER /* Score for criterion Q5 */,
  "q6" INTEGER /* Score for criterion Q6 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login (hashed and salted) */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., researcher, faculty, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "research_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the research_projects table */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the users table */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the evaluation was conducted */,
  "q1" INTEGER /* Score for criterion Q1 */,
  "q2" INTEGER /* Score for criterion Q2 */,
  "q3" INTEGER /* Score for criterion Q3 */,
  "q4" INTEGER /* Score for criterion Q4 */,
  "q5" INTEGER /* Score for criterion Q5 */,
  "q6" INTEGER /* Score for criterion Q6 */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the evaluator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "research_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the research_projects table */,
  "milestone_description" TEXT /* Description of the milestone */,
  "planned_date" TEXT /* Planned completion date for the milestone */,
  "actual_date" TEXT /* Actual completion date for the milestone */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the milestone (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects_users" (
  "research_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the research_projects table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the users table */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., PI, co-investigator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_id", "user_id")
)
